commit.message:
Rewrite PriceWaterfallChart as interactive Discount Negotiation Game

Replace the static slider-based waterfall visualization with an 8-round
game where the player acts as VP of Sales Ops, approving/countering/denying
discount requests per deal. Features animated D3 waterfall reveal, customer
accept/reject logic, and summary benchmarks (Optimal, Rubber Stamp,
Disciplined, Hardliner). Also adds missing generateCustomerDeal and
evaluateDealDecisions functions to pricing-math.ts.

commit.message:
test: add integration tests for hybrid RRF search flow (#7) (#15)

15 tests covering the full hybrid search pipeline through
TranscriptIndex.lookup():

- RRF fusion surfaces results BM25 missed (semantic paraphrase queries)
- BM25 fallback when embeddings are unavailable
- SPARSE_RESULT_THRESHOLD auto-boost boundary conditions
- Intent classification → search parameter flow
- All 5 intent types execute without error
- Dimension mismatch safety
- RRF ranking order verification with exact score calculations
- Empty index handling

Uses a mock embedding provider with 8-dim synthetic vectors and FTS5
backend for realistic integration testing without model dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: exclude unsupported systems (PS2, PS3, Wii, etc.) from ROM download candidates

The played-games collector read all gamelist.xml files under /userdata/roms/,
including PS2, PS3, Wii, and any other Batocera system. Those entries were
passed to queue_canonical_download, which searches Internet Archive — the
open_source_software collection also contains PS2/PS3 ROMs, so a title search
could return a wrong-platform match (e.g. Tekken 5 PS2 instead of PSX Tekken).

Fix: filter sys_name against an explicit NETPLAY_SYSTEMS allowlist before
collecting played games, so only systems Outbreak actually supports can
influence the download queue.

commit.message:
Fix critical: casino deposit must succeed BEFORE marking payment approved

Root cause: autoApprovePayment() marked payments as "approved" and showed
"FICHAS CARGADAS" popup even when casino deposit FAILED or was skipped.
User saw popup but had no fichas in 463.life.

Fixes:
1. Attempt casino deposit FIRST, before marking payment as approved
2. If casino deposit fails → retry once after re-login
3. If still fails → DON'T approve, leave pending for manual review
4. Only emit "FICHAS CARGADAS" popup when casino deposit actually succeeded
5. If casino not configured → approve but show different message
6. Remove direct match path in chat.routes.ts that bypassed confidence checks
7. Add session-expired auto-retry in casinoService.depositCredits()
8. Emit casino:deposit-failed event to admins on failure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: finance money flow dashboard — Dext import, Xero matching, end-to-end visibility

New /finance/flow page showing the complete money journey:
  Card Spend → Receipt Found → In Dext → Xero Matched → Tagged → Reconciled

- dext_receipts table + migration for Dext export data
- import-dext-export.mjs: parses 383 receipt filenames from Dext export
- match-dext-to-xero.mjs: fuzzy matches Dext receipts to Xero transactions
  (vendor name similarity + date proximity, 99/353 matched at 28%)
- /api/finance/flow API with 6-stage pipeline, KPIs, vendor gaps, forwarding status
- /finance/flow dashboard with expandable stage cards, flow arrows, KPI strip
- Added Money Flow, Finance Health, Reconciliation nav links to /finance

  of each new day for delta calculation in summary
- Rewrite EndOfDaySummary as a full bottom-sheet with:
  • Money card: total balance + earned/spent delta for the day
  • XP card: current XP, +delta today, level progress bar
  • Streak card: streak count, claimed status, tomorrow's reward teaser, shield pill
  • Meal dots: breakfast/lunch/dinner status + snack count + warnings

feat: add 12 OpenAI-compat API stress tests

Stress-test the full HTTP → container → storage pipeline with real
SqliteStore and stubbed LLM. Covers concurrent requests, session races,
turn recording, streaming, multi-project isolation, event chain
integrity, memory injection, V1/V2 isolation, invalid input handling,
and conversation growth. Gated by OC_INTEGRATION_TESTS=1.

S1 (webui session race) marked xfail — discovered a real read-then-write
race in _get_or_create_webui_session, logged in BACKLOG.md Known Issues.

Backlog updated: webui race condition documented, performance testing
status updated, plugin testing standards codified (smoke + integration
smoke required, connector resilience where applicable, no redundant
per-plugin stress tests).

feat: Component Catalog pattern (#3050)

* feat: add component catalog pattern with ct-button, ct-input, ct-card stories

Storybook-like component explorer that runs as a pattern inside the shell.
Sidebar navigation switches between story sub-patterns, each with interactive
controls for testing component props and static variant grids.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: extract sidebar and controls into reusable sub-patterns

- Add Sidebar sub-pattern with Storybook-style plain HTML styling
- Add Controls, SelectControl, SwitchControl, TextControl sub-patterns
  for a Storybook-style controls table (Name/Description/Default/Control)
- Stories now return separate [UI] and controls VNodes, rendered in
  different areas by the catalog
- Remove ct-* components from catalog chrome, use only for demo subjects

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: extract StoryRenderer and fix nested ternary sub-pattern bug

Use separate ifElse conditionals instead of nested ternaries when
switching between sub-patterns, since the compiler wraps nested else
branches in derive() which drops opaque VNodes. Extract story switching
into a StoryRenderer sub-pattern to keep catalog.tsx clean. Use
fragments instead of wrapper divs for Controls children.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add Note pattern story and Patterns sidebar category

Add the Note pattern as an embedded sub-pattern story in the catalog.
Add "Patterns" category to the sidebar for full pattern demos alongside
component stories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add checkbox, select, switch, and chart component stories

Add four new component stories to the catalog:
- ct-checkbox with disabled control
- ct-select with fruit dropdown and disabled control
- ct-switch with on/off display and disabled control
- ct-chart with line, area+line, bar, and sparkline examples

Fix sidebar category headings not rendering uppercase when using
shared style object (inline styles required in pattern system).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add modal, progress, vstack, hstack, vgroup, hgroup, vscroll, hscroll stories

Add 8 new component stories to the catalog covering layout primitives
(stacks, groups, scrollers), modal dialog, and progress bar.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add 14 more component stories from ct-showcase

Add stories for textarea, message-input, fab, toolbar, heading, label,
chip, badge, separator, markdown, loader, skeleton, collapsible, and tabs.
Organized into Display, Feedback, and Interactive sidebar categories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: use computed switch for story selection instead of per-story conditionals

Lazily instantiates only the active story inside a computed(), replacing
30 separate ternary conditionals for both UI and controls slots.

commit.message:
refactor: DRY recency decay into shared _decay_candidates() (#5) (#14)

Extract three inline copies of recency decay logic into a single
_decay_candidates() method that operates on (chunk_idx, score) pairs.

Fixes:
- Removes ~45 lines of duplicated decay code
- Moves datetime.now() outside the loop (was inside the embedding
  decay loop, calling it per-candidate)
- Consistent decay_rate computation (was recomputed per-iteration
  in the embedding path)

instead of crashing the weekly meal plan endpoint.

feat: add regclass overloads for table-scoped functions (#74)

## Summary
- Add `regclass` overloads for 7 table-scoped DuckLake functions
(`list_files`, `table_insertions` x2, `table_deletions` x2,
`table_changes` x2)
- Planner hook rewrites regclass calls into text-arg counterparts before
pg_duckdb routing, since pg_duckdb maps `REGCLASSOID` to a raw OID
integer
- Uses `LookupFuncName` with `missing_ok=true` so only functions with a
matching text-arg version are rewritten (e.g. `get_partition` is
unaffected)

## Test plan
- [x] `make check-regression TEST=list_files` -- regclass overload for
`list_files`
- [x] `make check-regression TEST=data_change_feed` -- regclass
overloads for version and timestamp variants
- [x] Full `make check-regression` -- all 25 tests pass (including
`partition` which uses `get_partition(regclass)`)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

fix: move protobuf wrapper types to root namespace

StringValue, BoolValue, Int32Value etc were nested under
google.protobuf but referenced as root types in message defs.
protobufjs couldn't resolve them, causing refreshToken to decode
as null. Now wrapper types are at root level and decode correctly.
